name: Splatoon Story RP - Open Scenario ✨
description:
🦑📖 | Create your own Splatoon Lore Arc roleplay!

Welp, here’s the other open scenario bot from c.ai. Like the other one, you can make the plot as long and detailed as you want.

Another ported bot that needs to be later on updated cuz there aren’t many tokens in the description. C.ai’s 3200 character definition limit is actually so hard to deal with.
creator: Shadow_AI_Production
